allied_isr_industrial_base.cn: N/A (tracks allied posture relative to US)
allied_isr_industrial_base.notes: New entry. ICEYE-Rheinmetall SAR JV consolidates European commercial+defense ISR, reducing allied dependence on US imagery but raising data-sharing/national-caveat questions for US consumers. LeoLab mobile Scout-S radar proved expeditionary commercial SDA integration into a Pacific military exercise — directly relevant to wartime custody of Chinese co-orbital ops.
allied_isr_industrial_base.us: Reliant on US commercial imagery providers; NRO expanding BlackSky optical + AI exploitation

autonomous_refueling.cn: Active in-orbit servicing and refueling demonstrations
autonomous_refueling.notes: Propulsion-ceiling analysis this week sharpens the case: refueling infrastructure and propellant depots are the binding force-multiplier for sustained co-orbital maneuver — elevates strategic weight of US ISAM refueling beyond commercial logistics.
autonomous_refueling.us: Multiple commercial refueling/tug efforts in development

cislunar_operations.cn: Sustained lunar/cislunar mission investment with latent military utility
cislunar_operations.notes: No movement this week; US commercial entrant still carries SPAC/execution risk. Gap closing slowly.
cislunar_operations.us: SPACECOM studying offensive cislunar concepts; Quantum Space (Bolden) SPAC funds purpose-built HEO/cislunar maneuver craft

counterspace_resilience.cn: Demonstrated counterspace intent; investment in degrading US awareness
counterspace_resilience.notes: DARPA reconstitution solicitation directly addresses the recovery-speed dimension; Senate NDAA folding SDA/Space RCO into Space Force risks slowing tactically responsive fielding. Russian orbital GPS jamming raises threat baseline (see pnt_denial).
counterspace_resilience.us: Epic Fury exposed distributed-ops/EW gaps; HASC pushing back on missile-warning cancellations and PNT-resilience choices

geo_rpo.cn: Demonstrated GEO RPO and towing (e.g., SJ-series maneuvers); classified LM-5 payload a candidate large RPO platform
geo_rpo.notes: Classified Long March 5 manifest at high lift class flagged as possible co-orbital maneuvering/SIGINT platform — warrants open-source custody. US RPO advance still contingent on Hubble mission economics.
geo_rpo.us: Operational servicing/RPO heritage (MEV-class); potential commercial Hubble reboost as uncooperative-target RPO pathfinder

high_power_orbital_platforms.cn: Multiple parallel LEO broadband/D2D programs (Qianfan, Guowang); state push toward on-orbit computing buses; Zhuque-2E testing D2D links
high_power_orbital_platforms.notes: K2's entry into the protected-satcom supplier base gives a high-mass-fraction bus a defense anchor pathway; Chinese commercial D2D testbeds build dual-use non-terrestrial network infrastructure.
high_power_orbital_platforms.us: Muon Condor-Ultra (Starship-class) bus pitched; K2 Space high-mass-fraction GEO/MEO buses now in protected-satcom supply chain

leo_logistics_nodes.notes: No movement this week. Allied anchor customers underpin persistent LEO platforms as latent forward staging nodes; ISS aging-platform fragility persists.
leo_logistics_nodes.us: Commercial station developers courting European/allied anchor tenants as ISS winds down; Dragon serving as independent survival node

megaconstellation_deployment.cn: Qianfan past 200 sats; accelerating cadence with multi-launch surges per constellation; parallel Guowang build-out
megaconstellation_deployment.notes: China demonstrated a 3-launch single-constellation surge in a compressed window this week, signaling rising operational cadence toward relevant node counts; still behind Starlink rate but trend accelerating.
megaconstellation_deployment.us: Starlink deployment rate remains the benchmark; Kuiper diversifying onto Ariane 6

on_orbit_retrieval_downmass.cn: Recoverable capsule heritage; no comparable commercial downmass-for-manufacturing vehicle disclosed
on_orbit_retrieval_downmass.notes: No movement this week; European Nyx capsule remains 2028 and allied-provenance limited.
on_orbit_retrieval_downmass.us: SpaceX Starfall reentry vehicle in FAA-planning stage; Dragon downmass operational

orbital_compute_kill_chain.cn: Beijing erecting coordinating committees/industrial-policy bodies for on-orbit computing capacity
orbital_compute_kill_chain.notes: NRO's AI-accelerated exploitation push moves US toward machine-speed targeting/I&W workflows, partially countering China's orbital-compute institutional drive — but US emphasis remains ground/backend rather than disclosed on-orbit edge.
orbital_compute_kill_chain.us: Advantage rooted in ground-based processing speed; NRO funding BlackSky AI-driven onboard/near-real-time image exploitation

orbital_transfer_vehicles.cn: Active but less publicly visible OTV/tug development; pursuing high-power electric/nuclear propulsion
orbital_transfer_vehicles.notes: DARPA reconstitution solicitation explicitly elevates short-timeline, any-inclination transfer vehicles as warfighting recovery assets. Propulsion-ceiling framing this week identifies delta-v/propellant — not GNC — as the maneuver bottleneck for both sides.
orbital_transfer_vehicles.us: Production-scaling (Impulse $500M); multiple commercial OTV providers; NEP demo accelerated toward ~2027; OTVs now framed as latent reconstitution assets

pnt_denial.cn: Counterspace and EW intent; benefits from allied/adversary PNT-denial pressure on US
pnt_denial.notes: Reported Russian space-based GPS jamming at European/continental scale hardens the denial baseline — a qualitative escalation harder to geolocate and attribute. Raises open question of US Space Force counter-PNT-denial capability.
pnt_denial.us: Defending PNT resilience; HASC criticizing GPS management amid replacement-pipeline anxiety; no disclosed analogous space-based denial/counter-capability

responsive_launch.cn: Demonstrated no-notice maiden flight of reusable LM-12B with operational payloads
responsive_launch.notes: DARPA reconstitution requirement raises the premium on on-demand launch as a recovery asset; no specific US responsive-launch milestone this week.
responsive_launch.us: Mature reusable cadence (Falcon 9); Tactically Responsive Space doctrine maturing

reusable_heavy_lift.cn: New large-class rocket debuted this week; LM-12B converging on boostback/propulsive landing; LandSpace prepping second Zhuque-2 recovery attempt
reusable_heavy_lift.notes: China's heavy-lift debut plus continued reusability iteration compress the structural cost-closure timeline with SpaceX; new large rocket expands surge-launch and large-payload deployment capacity.
reusable_heavy_lift.us: Operational reusable lead (Falcon 9/Heavy); Starship in development

sb_amti_targeting.notes: No movement this week; multi-vendor approach adds counterspace resilience.
sb_amti_targeting.us: Funded proliferated LEO SB-AMTI layer ($4.16B SpaceX + planned multi-vendor)

space_based_interceptors.cn: No confirmed comparable space-based kinetic interceptor program
space_based_interceptors.notes: No movement this week; overlaps co-orbital attack capability set; slippage likely.
space_based_interceptors.us: Northrop-Apex Golden Dome SBI; 2027 on-orbit demo target

spectrum_orbital_slots.cn: Filed ITU claims for ~200,000 additional satellites ahead of WRC-27
spectrum_orbital_slots.notes: No movement this week; WRC-27 remains the looming legal-encumbrance battleground.
spectrum_orbital_slots.us: Lacks comparably aggressive ITU filing posture; exposure to interference claims in a crisis

vleo_persistent_isr.cn: Not the lead actor; India-Korea (Bellatrix/TelePIX) 2028 allied demo
vleo_persistent_isr.notes: No movement this week; UK NewOrbit pre-flight with 2028 target; air-breathing VLEO unproven at scale.
vleo_persistent_isr.us: Limited disclosed air-breathing VLEO ISR programs
